statement: In every magma, Equation 1019 (`x = y * ((z * w) * (u * v))`) implies Equation 2363 (`x = (y * (y * (z * w))) * u`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0146
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u v : G, x = (op y (op (op z w) (op u v)))) :
    ∀ x y z w u v : G, x = (op (op y (op y (op z w))) u)
